meta.title: Aura Score Test | DopaBrain
meta.description: Find out your aura score! 12 social scenarios to calculate your aura points.

app.title: Aura Score Test
app.subtitle: How many aura points do you have?
app.description: Answer 12 social scenarios to calculate your aura points. Are you radiating NPC Energy or are you an Aura God?

q1.text: You trip in front of your crush

q2.text: Someone cuts in line in front of you

q3.text: You accidentally send a text to the wrong person
q3.a: Own it and joke about it

q4.text: You catch something thrown at you without looking

q5.text: Your friend roasts you in front of everyone

q6.text: You walk into a glass door
q6.a: Inspect the glass like a professional

q7.text: You're the last one picked for a team

q8.text: Your phone rings loudly in a quiet room

q9.text: You wave back at someone who wasn't waving at you
q9.a: Redirect the wave to someone else
q9.c: Slowly lower your hand in shame

q10.text: A stranger asks for your number
q10.d: Pretend not to speak their language

q11.text: You accidentally like an old photo while stalking
q11.b: Double down and leave a comment

q12.text: You're suddenly asked to give a speech

npc.name: NPC Energy
npc.desc: You're running on autopilot. Your dialogue options are 'Hello' and '...' You walk into walls and repeat the same path daily. But hey, at least you're consistent!

background.name: Background Character
background.desc: You exist in the scene but nobody remembers your name. You're the blur in the background of someone else's main character moment. Room for growth!

side.name: Side Character
side.desc: You've got memorable moments! People know your name and you occasionally steal the scene. You're the friend everyone loves but you haven't unlocked your full arc yet.

main.name: Main Character
main.desc: The camera follows YOU. Every room you enter, the energy shifts. You've got the plot armor, the character development, and the soundtrack. People write fanfic about you.

god.name: Aura God
god.desc: You don't just have aura — you ARE the aura. Reality bends around your presence. When you walk in, even the main characters become NPCs. Legends are written about you.

share.title: Share Your Aura
share.text: My aura score is {score}! I'm "{tier}" ✨ Check yours:
